post.description: Analyzes hotspot trends based on baseline and current time windows.
Analyzes hotspot trends for modules based on baseline and current time windows.
Analyzes the trend of a specific file over time.
Analyzes the trend of modules over time.

Analyzes trends overview for complexity, loc, and silo ratio over time.

When start_date or end_date are omitted the endpoint defaults to the last
12 months (end = now, start = now - 365 days).

Returns bucketed time-series for complexity, LOC, silo-ratio, and commits
for every module (or the requested subset) in a single response.
All modules share the same time axis (buckets).
Analyzes warnings from various analyses.
Retrieves the historical complexity trend for a specific file.

Retrieves the latest complexity metrics for files combined with a trend indicator
calculated over the specified date range.

Retrieves the latest complexity metrics for modules combined with a trend indicator
calculated over the specified date range.

Returns the average cognitive complexity across all files (latest value per file
as of ``end_date``) together with its growth percentage compared to the window
shifted back by ``trend_window_days`` days.

Files with a cognitive complexity of 0 are excluded (e.g. non-code assets).

Retrieves a detailed analysis of commit activity for files, including
commit counts, author metrics, and last modification details.

Retrieves a detailed analysis of commit activity for modules, including
commit counts, author metrics, and last modification details.

Retrieves the total commit count and growth percentage for the specified period.

The growth percentage is calculated by comparing the total commits up to the end_date
with the total commits up to a previous point in time (end_date - trend_window_days).
Analyzes contributor ownership and concentration at the **file level**.
Analyzes contributor ownership and concentration at the **module level**.
Analyzes Lines of Code (LOC) at the file level.
Analyzes Lines of Code (LOC) at the module level.
Analyzes the total Lines of Code (LOC) for the project.

Analyzes the alignment between modules and teams.
Calculates the ownership ratio of each team for each module based on net LOC changes.
(How much of Module X is owned by Team Y?)

Analyzes the alignment between teams and modules.
Calculates the effort ratio of modules for each team based on net LOC changes.
(How much of Team Y's effort goes into Module X?)
Analyzes the absolute code churn for files within a given time range.
Analyzes the absolute code churn for modules within a given time range.

Returns the average file age in days across all files in the specified window,
plus a growth percentage compared to the same window shifted back by trend_window_days.

Returns all files that are classified as a knowledge silo.

A file is a silo when a single developer accounts for at least
`silo_threshold` (default 80 %) of all commits to that file.
Results are ordered by ownership percentage descending.

Returns the silo density for each component/module.

Reports what fraction of a module's files are silos and which
developer is responsible for the most silos within that module.
Results are ordered by silo ratio descending.

Returns the silo footprint of each developer.

Shows how many files and modules each developer is the sole knowledge
holder of, ordered by silo file count descending.

Returns the total number of silo files together with the growth percentage
compared to the previous window (shifted back by ``trend_window_days``).

Uses the same ``silo_threshold`` and ``min_commits`` filters as the other
silo endpoints so all numbers are consistent.

Retrieves a summary of key metrics including total commits, file age, complexity, and silo ratio,
along with trend percentages compared to a baseline period.

AnalysisSettingsWrapped.title: AnalysisSettingsWrapped
AnalysisSettingsWrapped.description: Wrapper response model exposing analysis settings under an `items` key.

trend_window_days.description: Days to shift back for comparison (7 = week, 30 = month)

avg_file_age_days.description: Average file age in days across all files in the window

growth_pct.title: Growth Pct
growth_pct.description: Growth vs. same window shifted back by trend_window_days
